diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase, providing constructor with default router configuration, route registration methods, and request handling entry points.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Entry point for the Hono framework, defaulting to a SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class providing core Hono functionality including route registration (addRoute, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, on, use), request handling (#dispatch), and mounting (mount, route, basePath).
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, GetPath, Env, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath.
+- Simple note: Core implementation with route methods, request dispatch, middleware support, and mounting capabilities for sub-applications.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file exporting the PatternRouter class.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation using compiled Regular Expressions for routing, supports named parameters with patterns (e.g., :id{[0-9]+}), and converts paths to regex on add.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, insert, buildRegExp, match, Node, Trie, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP.
+- Simple note: Fast regex-based routing with pattern support but limited param name flexibility.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file exporting the LinearRouter class.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation storing routes as string keys, performs linear search matching routes in registration order, handles wildcards, named params, and optional params.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, emptyParams, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Simple linear search routing with full path matching and support for all pattern types.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that re-exports RegExpRouter and exports PreparedRegExpRouter with helper functions.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Barrel export with Serialized Router support for worker compatibility.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter implementation using Trie for path storage and compiling to Regular Expressions, supports middleware registration, handles wildcards and named parameters with patterns.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, message constants, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, Matcher, StaticMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, buildRegExp, Trie, emptyParam, ParamAssocArray, ParamIndexMap, HandlerWithMetadata, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, PATH_ERROR, buildAllMatchers, match.
+- Simple note: Two-phase routing adding routes then building regex matcher for fast matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher interface as tuple of [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap] and provides match function that first checks static routes then falls back to regex.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, ParamStash, Result, Router, emptyParam, STATIC_MATCH, METHOD_NAME_ALL, match.
+- Simple note: Core matching logic supporting both exact path matches and regex fallback.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization, receives pre-built matchers and relocate map, adds routes and rebuilds matchers, supports adding wildcards and paths.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RegExpRouter, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, HandlerData, insert, add, buildAllMatchers.
+- Simple note: Serialized router state for use in Worker environments without runtime trie/router.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing trie nodes with children, methods per node, and patterns, maintains varIndex for param mapping, supports insert for tree construction and buildRegExpStr for regex generation.
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, buildRegExpStr, Context, PARAM_REGEXP_STR, WILD_CARD_REGEXP_STR, TAIL_WILD_CARD_REGEXP_STR, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, regExpMetaChars.
+- Simple note: Trie node with children, method handlers, and pattern definitions for route tree.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class managing the route tree, processes path patterns replacing named params with marks, builds regular expression from node's regex string, generates parameter index maps.
+- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, Node, insert, buildRegExp, compareKey, Context, PathError, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REGEXP_STR, TAIL_WILD_CARD_REGEXP_STR, PATH_ERROR.
+- Simple note: Route tree storage optimized for regex compilation with parameter tracking.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Simple index file exporting the SmartRouter class.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter wraps other routers (typically RegExpRouter then TrieRouter), maintains route list, delegates matching to active router, switches routers when one can handle all routes.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, result, routes, routers, activeRouter.
+- Simple note: Adaptive router tha
